name: Cucumber Pea Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the mayonnaise dressing.
2. Pare the cucumbers and cut a slice from each end of each cucumber.
3. Cut the cucumbers in half crosswise.
4. Scoop out the center, making thin-shelled cups.
5. Chill thoroughly.
6. Combine the cucumber pulp, peas, and chicken in a bowl.
7. Season to taste.
8. Moisten with mayonnaise.
9. Mix lightly with 2 forks.
10. Fill each cucumber cup with the mixture.
11. Stand each cup on a slice of tomato on a bed of lettuce.
12. Serve with mayonnaise garnished with paprika. Makes 6 servings.
